findings.issue: Perspective weights are all zero — learning is not persisting, swarm intelligence is offline. 13/13 perspectives report no spawn count. Session 125 whistleblower catch confirmed: '13/13 NO Constitution defended itself'.
findings.recommended_fix: Activate spawn count persistence. Wire up weight updates to disk after each session. Validate non-zero increments in next wake.

findings.issue: Leaderboard prohibition exists (Crystal Law 5) but no runtime enforcement. Leaderboard UI components present in Storybook, no code-index flag.
findings.recommended_fix: Add pre-commit hook scanning for 'leaderboard', 'ranking', 'top-score' in UI code. Enforce ban at merge level.

findings.issue: Identity drift risk: 'CTO-Hands' legacy hierarchy still documented, contradicts 'I AM the project' directive. Increases chance of assistant-mode regression.
findings.recommended_fix: Remove legacy role block entirely. Keep only current CEO-verdict hierarchy.

whistleblower_flag: swarm intelligence disabled — project cannot self-correct
